name: Robocraft
short_description: Build insane, fully customisable robot battle vehicles that drive, hover, walk and fly in the free-to-play action game Robocraft. Add weapons from the future and jump in the driving seat as you take your creation into battle against other players online!
detailed_description:
Build insane, fully customisable robot battle vehicles that drive, hover, walk and fly in the free-to-play action game Robocraft. Add weapons from the future and jump in the driving seat as you take your creation into battle against others online!

BUILD - Combine blocks in an easy-to-use editor interface to create a futuristic robot battle vehicle armed with dozens of different weapon options.


DRIVE - Jump into the pilot seat and test out your robot design against AI. Jet cars, tanks, flying warships, helicopters, drones; almost any vehicle is possible in Robocraft!


FIGHT - Battle online in vast battlefields against players from all over the world on dedicated servers.


ADDITIONAL FEATURES

  • Over 250 cubes and growing! Be part of a constantly changing metagame with new weapons, components and features added every month
  • Watch as enemy robots break apart cube by cube as you destroy them with powerful weaponry which players can switch between at their leisure
  • Form Parties and battle on the same team with your friends
  • Create or join Clans of up to 50 players
  • Share your robotic creations with other players online via the Community Robot Factory

For more information about Robocraft, please visit

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean

reviews.review_text:
Rest in peace, overlooked gem.
Rest in peace.

This game was overall very fun, good to play solo or with friends. honestly prefer the feel of this one, compared to play testing robocraft 2. There's playstyles depending on the type of bot you build. ive seen tiny bots with helium and 1 railgun that hovers high in the sky. theres walkers and the classic tank set ups. i personally like the normal lazers when higher tiered or the plasma cannons myself. Also the minigun and blades shred if you make faster ground bots to close the range vs walkers, though I prefered making fliers. over all great game, fliers are balance with the anti-air guns which feel very nice to use as a secondary weapon. great game 10/10 would recommend to people of all ages.

TLDR: play this game if you like building/customizing robots and robot fights.
Does not run for me. It says it is loading stats and needs a network connection, which it has.
So sad it had to go, will be in my childhood for ever!
